title: Spud Keeper
description:
Survive the seasons. Defend your crop. Harvest your spuds.Spud Keeper is a wave-defense action game with incremental and roguelite elements, where you protect your potato plants from escalating pest attacks by collecting and smashing bugs, earning rewards, and upgrading your tools to survive longer.

COLLECT BUGS!They will come from burrows in waves and attack the potatoes. Collect them from the potato plants before they are drained.

RELEASE 'EM!Empty out your bucket in the smashing area so that you can pick-up next batch of bugs.

SMASH 'EM!Clear the smashing area to earn coins and survive waves and seasons!

BUY NEW TOOLS!Spend your Coins in run-based shop and spend Spuds in meta-progression shop
description_short: Pick up and smash bugs, upgrade your tools to protect your potato patch from escalating waves of pests!
